Default Prove-Up In Scd.

MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, CSR: Susan Lee.
Atty. Christina J. Collins, Esq. for Plaintiff. Plaintiff Jose Castaneda has been sworn and examined.
No appearance by defendant Nicole Castaneda aka Nicole Braganti.

After hearing the evidence presented, the Court took the matter under submission.
(Principal-$30,000; Cost-$540.51; Attys fee-$1,635.00 ; Interest- $3,491.57)
